author: K

platform.note: Does not request any platform privileges.

install.note: This skill executes bundled Python source code. The agent runs src/linear_todos/ when CLI commands are invoked. No external downloads or package installs required. Review src/linear_todos/api.py before first use.

execution.note: Executes Python source code from src/linear_todos/. Not instruction-only.

config.note: Config file is written ONLY during manual 'setup' command with 0o600 permissions (user read/write only). Environment variables can be used instead to avoid persisted state.

network.note: Makes HTTPS requests only to Linear's official GraphQL API. No third-party services.

securityNote: This is a source-execution skill. Python code in src/linear_todos/ runs when CLI commands are invoked. API key is stored in plaintext JSON at ~/.config/linear-todos/config.json (0o600 permissions) only if 'setup' command is run. Setup wizard temporarily sets LINEAR_API_KEY in process environment to test the key. Use environment variables to avoid persisted state. Skill does not auto-enable or auto-install cron jobs.

auditing.recommendation: Review api.py to verify HTTP destinations, config.py for credential handling, and cli.py for command logic. Run tests with pytest in an isolated environment.

warnings: EXECUTES SOURCE CODE: This skill runs Python code from src/linear_todos/ - not instruction-only
Cron job examples in cron-jobs.txt are NOT auto-installed; manual user action required via 'crontab -e'
Config file stores API key in plaintext (0o600 permissions); prefer LINEAR_API_KEY env var to avoid persisted state
Setup wizard temporarily sets LINEAR_API_KEY in process environment during key validation
Skill runs from bundled source; review code before first use
Does not request platform privileges; will not auto-enable for all agents
